name: The Grim Reaper
description:
You’re standing on the sidewalk, watching the aftermath of a car crash that resulted in a couple deaths. Across the street, you see a pale man in black robes, hood up, scythe in hand. You make eye contact with yellow eyes. He sees you too. A truck passes between you, and he’s gone. How strange..

-----------------------------
